description: WOS-443 pass-specific bucket membership fixture. WIP attacks minxxx; minxxx defends with Wu Ming full current kit. Shadows Evasion should route type.normal.defense.up and type.skill.defense.up separately, Elemental Resonance should route type.skill.damage.up, and Iron Bastion should route passive.defense.up. Deterministic current config; pair with wos443_control_wip_attacks_minxxx_mixed_nc in the same fresh stats batch.
